name: DOLLMA
notes: Primary LLM pretraining corpus; Wiki, news, laws, blogs, books

name: azWaC
notes: Web-crawled 2012; deduplicated; oldest major AZ corpus

name: azcorpus_v0
notes: 1.9M documents across diverse topics for text generation

name: AZ Wikipedia
notes: Subset used in DOLLMA; also available via Wikimedia dumps

name: C4-AZ
notes: Noisy; significant non-AZ content found on inspection

name: OSCAR-AZ
notes: Common Crawl filtered subset; used before DOLLMA

name: AZ Laws corpus
notes: Azerbaijani legal texts; independently released by aLLMA Lab

name: azerbaijani-blogs
notes: Blog text corpus; limited documentation

name: Domrachev-Sudoplatova
notes: Scraped corpus used in morpheme boundary detection research

name: AZ NER Dataset
notes: 25-class NER; annotated Azerbaijani named entities

name: AZ Sentiment (reviews)
notes: 160K customer reviews with scores; largest AZ sentiment resource

name: AZ Sentiment (social+news)
notes: 38K comments + 12K news articles; binary sentiment labels

name: AZ Twitter Sentiment
notes: First AZ Twitter sentiment dataset; LR/NB/SVM baselines

name: AZE-SCI
notes: Text classification dataset; 4+ science categories

name: AZE-NSP
notes: Next-sentence prediction; built from Azerbaijani books

name: CB-MCQ
notes: Closed-book MCQ; middle/high school + driver exam topics

name: Aze-Instruct-2K
notes: 12 reasoning domains; used to train AzQ-1.7B

name: AZ-MRPC (translated)
notes: Azerbaijani translation of MRPC; used in NLU benchmark

name: UD Azerbaijani-TueCL
notes: UD treebank; 20 Cairo + 90 Turkic group sentences

name: TUMLU-AZ
notes: Turkic MMLU; AZ subset spans 11 subjects; natively authored

name: TUMLU-mini-AZ
notes: Manually verified balanced subset; recommended for evaluation

name: aLLMA NLU Benchmark
notes: First systematic AZ NLU benchmark; covers 4 tasks

name: BLEnD-AZ
notes: Cross-cultural QA; AZ is one of 13 languages

name: aLLMA-SMALL
notes: Monolingual AZ encoder; trained on DOLLMA; dynamic masking

name: aLLMA-BASE
notes: Monolingual AZ BERT-base; best AZ-only encoder as of 2024

name: AzQ-1.7B
notes: Qwen3-1.7B fine-tuned; 12 reasoning domains; 2025

name: AtLLaMA
notes: LLaMA-3.1-8B fine-tuned on 50K AZ instruction pairs

name: az-mistral
notes: Mistral-7B fine-tuned on AZ Alpaca; project Barbarossa

name: HPLT-BERT-AZ
notes: BERT trained on HPLT web corpus; multilingual project

name: mBERT-AZ
notes: Baseline multilingual BERT; 104 languages incl. AZ

name: XLM-R-AZ
notes: Strong multilingual baseline; best zero-shot AZ performer

name: AZ Sentiment XLM-R
notes: XLM-RoBERTa fine-tuned for 3-class AZ sentiment

name: AzerBERT (Iranian AZ)
notes: For Iranian Azerbaijani (azb); NER + POS + classification

name: Azmorph
notes: Pre-alpha morphological analyzer for Azerbaijani

name: MorAz
notes: Open-source morphological analyzer; Özenç et al. 2018

name: awesome-azerbaijani-nlp
notes: Curated list of AZ NLP resources; precursor to ALMAZ registry

name: Common Voice AZ (CV-17)
notes: AZ subset of Common Voice 17; crowd-sourced read speech; validated hours growing each release

name: FLEURS-AZ
notes: Few-shot learning eval speech; AZ is one of 102 languages; useful for ASR benchmarking

name: ISSAI Turkic ASR
notes: Multilingual ASR for 10 Turkic langs incl. AZ; Bashkir · Chuvash · Kazakh · Kyrgyz · Sakha · Tatar · Turkish · Uyghur · Uzbek

name: ISSAI Turkic TTS
notes: Multilingual TTS for 10 Turkic langs incl. AZ; text-to-speech synthesis system

name: ParaCrawl AZ-EN
notes: English-Azerbaijani parallel corpus from web crawl; ParaCrawl bonus language release

name: OPUS AZ corpora
notes: Collection of AZ parallel corpora on OPUS incl. WikiMatrix · CCAligned · NLLB pairs

name: TIL-MT Azerbaijani
notes: Turkic Interlingua multilingual MT corpus; AZ included in 22-language parallel set

name: eQanun Legal Corpus
notes: All laws · acts · decrees from e-qanun.az (Ministry of Justice AZ); up to doc ID 55103

name: Whisper-AZ (multilingual)
notes: Whisper large-v3 supports AZ natively; achieves WER below 50% threshold for usable transcripts
